home.tagline:
Trusted guidance for Roma communities.
Ask anything. No judgment.
home.trending1Truth: Vaccines do NOT change your DNA. They teach your immune system to fight disease.
home.trending2Truth: Diabetes medication saves lives. Cinnamon cannot replace it.
home.trending3Truth: They soothe a sore throat, but do NOT cure the flu.

sos.ariaFab: Emergency SOS — tap for emergency numbers and first aid
sos.title: Emergency
sos.stepsBleeding: Press HARD with clean cloth. Do NOT lift. Add more cloth on top. Call emergency services.
sos.stepsChoking: 5 back blows between shoulder blades. 5 abdominal thrusts. Repeat. Call emergency services.
sos.stepsBurns: Cool water 10+ min. No butter or oil. Cover loosely. Call emergency if large or deep.
sos.stepsCpr: Call emergency. Push hard and fast in the center of the chest. Do not stop until help arrives.
sos.stepsSeizure: Clear the area. Do NOT hold the person or put anything in the mouth. Time the seizure. Call if longer than 5 minutes.
sos.stepsPoison: Call poison control. Do NOT induce vomiting. Keep the label or container. Call emergency if severe.
